channel.title: Systems Thinking on Rə:Generate
channel.description: Recent content in Systems Thinking on Rə:Generate

item.title: Fungal Protocols: Decentralized Infrastructure Modeled on Nature
item.description: The complexity unfolding beneath our feet often surpasses what we perceive on the surface. Invisible to the naked eye, yet fundamental to life on Earth, a network of immense intelligence and connectivity weaves itself: the mycelium. This fascinating web of fungal threads is not merely the root of our ecosystems but also a radical blueprint for the transformative redesign of our economy and society. At the intersection of radical ecology and avant-garde design, we understand the mycelium not as a mere biological curiosity, but as the superior evolutionary model for decentralized, absolutely resilient network economies.
